title: Video Wallpaper
empty: No videos found in the configured directory
settings.video_directory.label: Video directory
settings.video_directory.description: Folder scanned for wallpaper videos. Defaults to ~/Videos when empty.
settings.mute.label: Mute audio
settings.hardware_decode.label: Hardware decoding
settings.auto_pause.label: Pause when covered
settings.auto_pause.description: Pause playback while a fullscreen window covers the wallpaper (mpvpaper --auto-pause).
settings.mpv_options.label: Extra mpv options
settings.mpv_options.description: Additional space-separated mpv options, e.g. panscan=1.0 video-zoom=0.1
settings.glyph.label: Glyph
settings.run_as_systemd.label: Run as systemd service
settings.run_as_systemd.description: Run the wallpaper in a systemd transient scope to enforce strict resource limits.
settings.extract_last_frame.label: Static fallback frame
settings.extract_last_frame.description: Automatically extract a frame from the video to use as the static wallpaper when playback is stopped.
settings.cpu_quota.label: CPU Quota
settings.allowed_cpus.label: Allowed CPUs
settings.memory_max.label: Max Memory
settings.cpu_weight.label: CPU Weight
settings.nice.label: Nice value
